prompt: A drone scans for survivors and a ground robot delivers medical kits. It’s always possible to reach a state where both have completed their missions. If battery < 10%, drone must return to base within 20 seconds.
constraints: Always possible for both to complete missions
RescueDrone returns to base within 20 seconds when battery < 10%

results.constraint: Always possible for both to complete missions

}

results.constraint: RescueDrone returns to base within 20 seconds when battery < 10%

This ensures safety by preventing the drone from operating with critically low power, which could lead to failure in mission-critical situations.
